UprightImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in an upright position.
UprightImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in a reversed position.

ReversedImage.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in an reversed position.
ReversedImage.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in a upright position.

records.Description: This card signifies a burgeoning opportunity related to material resources, finances, or career beginnings. It suggests a foundation being laid for stability and prosperity, but with a need for careful nurturing and grounded action. The path forward requires patience and a practical approach, focusing on building something solid from the ground up.  It speaks to potential and the power to manifest abundance through diligent effort.
Keywords: opportunity, foundation, prosperity, practicality, growth, potential, stability, manifestation
records.Advice: Invest time and effort wisely in building a secure future. Focus on practical steps and responsible financial management to realize your potential.
records.Affirmation:
I am building a strong foundation.
I attract abundance and prosperity.
My efforts yield fruitful results.

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in an upright position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in a reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the joyful camaraderie, merriment, and unity among the Robin Hood band in Sherwood Forest.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the distant castle as the focus of this card. Instead, celebrate the present moment of feasting and fellowship.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Four of Wands card in an upright position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, uilleann pipes, hopeful, optimistic, building, instrumental

Image.Positive: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in an reversed position.
Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in a upright position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the frozen courtiers, envy, fear, and the untouched banquet to convey a sense of stagnation and missed opportunities
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the opulence and gold sheen as they contribute to the sense of stagnation rather than progress
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Four of Wands card in an reversed position.

Music.Tags: Celtic-orchestral, strings, harp, flute, reversed, introspective, suspenseful, ambient, instrumental

Image.Negative: Describe the imagery and symbolism of the Four of Wands card in a upright and reversed position.

Narration.Emphasis: Highlight the sense of community, joy, and celebration amidst the modest village harvest festival.
Narration.De-emphasis: Avoid over-emphasizing the fatigue or hard work involved in the harvest.
Narration.Style: Narrate in a storytelling manner, engaging the listener with vivid descriptions.
Narration.Content: Focus on the symbolism and meaning of the Four of Wands card in an between position.
